'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 1''' is the premiere issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in [[October]] [[1994]]. The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 1, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with the ''[[Tales of the Jedi: Dark Lords of the Sith Special Ashcan Edition]]'' [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]], and ''[[1995 Topps Star Wars Widevision]]'' and ''[[Star Wars]]'' Topps Finest<!--Not released until 1996, is this correct?--> trading cards. This issue also included the fold-out poster article ''[[Boba Fett: Mystery Man in Not-So-Shining Armor]]''.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
===Departments===
*''[[Rebel Report]]''
*[[Around the Galaxy|''Around The Galaxy'']]
*''[[Game Room]]'': ''Revving Up the 'Jedi Engine'''
*''[[ComicScan]]'': ''Double Your Star Wars Pleasure''
*''[[Star FX]]'': ''The Magic-Making Machine''
*[[Galactic Bazaar|''The Galactic Bazaar'']]
*''[[Cyber Notes]]''
*[[Use the Force|''Use The Force'']]

===Features===
*''[[The Awesome Adventures of Ken Steacy]]''
*''[[Taggor Bren: One Dangerous Bounty Hunter]]''
*[[A Book Excerpt|''A Book Excerpt: The Crystal Star'']]
*[[Boba Fett: Mystery Man in Not-So-Shining Armor|Boba Fett Poster]]
*[[Artoo's Day Out|''Star Wars: Droids'']]
